messages.content:
她不知道自己要怎么卑微，才能继续留下来。

　　所以她望着他，否定的摇头，如他所愿的任性着，喃呐着，“我不管你们the Homan Family怎样的，反正我就是不去上班了，我要回美国。”

　　她就是要离开他，无论从工作还是私人感情，她都要离开他。

　　Garrett望着她许久，最终却还是又询问她，“所以你是打定主意要辞职，要离开？”
translate it into English

She didn't know how to be humble enough to stay.
So she looked at him and shook her head in denial, stubbornly murmuring, "I don't care about the Homan Family, I'm just not going to work anymore. I'm going back to America."
She just wanted to leave him, whether it was from work or personal feelings, she wanted to leave him.
Garrett looked at her for a long time, but in the end, he still asked her, "So you're determined to resign, to leave?"
Can you make your translation more faithful and more fluent?

She didn't know how to be sufficiently subservient to remain there.
So she gazed at him and shook her head, stubbornly murmuring as he desired, "I don't care about the Homan Family, anyway. I'm just not going to work anymore; I'm going back to the United States."
She simply wanted to distance herself from him, whether in terms of work or personal emotions - she wanted to part ways.
Garrett stared at her for a while, but eventually still asked her, "So, have you made up your mind to quit and leave?"

她负责的项目，她反复确认了五遍，还会出问题？

　　但是那是个大单，她只能叫司机师傅调头。

　　然后……

　　嗯，十点半，她拖着行李箱进了傅氏大楼。

　　有同事看到她，问她：“你这是？打算搬来公司住啊？”
translate it into English

She had double-checked her assigned project five times, so how could there still be issues?

However, it was a major deal, and all she could do was ask the driver to turn around.

And then...

Hmm, 10:30, she dragged her suitcase into the Fu Building.

A colleague saw her and asked, "What's this? Are you planning to move into the company?"

Claire这才回过神，慢吞吞的拖着行李箱走出去。

　　“欢迎Ms. Dale。”

　　拿着鲜花的是楼上原来秘书的助理，跟她年纪相仿。

　　她接过鲜花，下意识的点头，“谢谢。”

　　其实她完全是懵逼状态，直到Ms. Bennett说，“怎么样？这个惊喜不错吧？”

　　她还是没回过神，问：“不是说项目出了问题吗？”

　　“以你做事严谨的状态，怎么可能出问题，是今日正式升任老板秘书一职，所以特地给你个惊喜。”
translate it into English

Claire finally snapped out of it and slowly dragged her suitcase out.

"Welcome, Ms. Dale."

The assistant who used to be the secretary upstairs greeted her with flowers, around the same age as her.

She took the flowers and nodded subconsciously, "Thank you."

In fact, she was completely bewildered until Ms. Bennett said, "How is it? Isn't this surprise great?"

She still hadn't fully regained her senses and asked, "Wasn't there a problem with the project?"

"With your meticulous work ethic, how could there be a problem? You have officially been promoted to the position of the boss's secretary today, so we prepared this surprise for you."

她还什么都没说，他就知道她小女孩性子了？

　　“在这里没有娇气的小女孩，只有专业的秘书，如果你做不好，我会……”

　　他突然停住。

　　但是Claire心里却悄悄激动起来。

　　他会什么？

　　把她开除？

　　那可就太好了，她保准娇气给他看。
translate it into English

He knew she had a somewhat childish temperament even before she said anything?

"There are no delicate little girls here, only professional secretaries. If you can't handle it, I will..."

He suddenly stopped.

But Claire felt a secret excitement in her heart.

What would he do?

Fire her?

Well, that would be great. She would show him just how delicate she could be.

这里是公司，收起你的小女孩性子。”

　　“……”

　　她还什么都没说，他就知道她小女孩性子了？

　　“在这里没有娇气的小女孩，只有专业的秘书，如果你做不好，我会……”

　　他突然停住。

　　但是Claire心里却悄悄激动起来。

　　他会什么？

　　把她开除？

　　那可就太好了，她保准娇气给他看。
translate it into English

"This is a company, put away your childish behavior."

"..."

How did he know she had a childish temperament even before she said anything?

"There are no delicate little girls here, only professional secretaries. If you can't do well, I will..."

He suddenly stopped.

But Claire felt a quiet excitement building up inside her.

What would he do?

Fire her?

Well, that would be great. She was determined to show him just how delicate she could be.

Claire只觉得他清冷的气息扑面而来，条件反射的后退。

　　Garrett不高兴的望着她，他有点讨厌她每次都后退。

　　他只是靠近了一点，怎么了？

　　她还是他的妻子呢。

　　跟别的男人大晚上去喝咖啡，还在那么神秘的地方，跟他就……
translate it into English

Claire could only feel his icy breath washing over her, causing her to instinctively step back.

Garrett looked at her with annoyance, finding it irritating that she always backed away like that.

He had just approached a little, what's wrong?

After all, she was his wife.

Heading out to drink coffee with another man late at night, in such a mysterious place, and then...

她亲眼看着两个人的衣服贴在了一起，那一刻她突然不敢呼吸。

　　而Garrett自然也低眸就看到那里，但是不知道是处于什么心理，他还是又往前，直到感觉到两个人之间没有缝隙，他才停下，然后质问她，“怎么不退了？”

　　“Mr. Homan请自重。”

　　她被逼的眼睛里升起氤氲，还是不忘提醒他。

　　“Mr. Homan可以自重，但是你丈夫不需要。”
translate it into English

She watched with her own eyes as their clothes pressed against each other, and in that moment, she suddenly couldn't breathe.

Garrett naturally lowered his gaze and noticed it too, but for some reason, he still moved closer, until there was no gap left between them. Only then did he stop and question her, "Why aren't you stepping back?"

"Mr. Homan, please show some restraint."

Tears welled up in her forced eyes, but she still reminded him.

"Mr. Homan can show restraint, but your husband doesn't need to."

Garrett突然一只手抵着墙上，然后又压低自己到她眼前，俩人的呼吸很快又暧昧的撕缠在一起，他低沉的嗓音这才响起，“很生气？”

　　她别开脸，气的半死也不想再惹他。

　　Garrett敏捷的眼神就那么直直的望着她，突然笑了起来。

　　她更是被气的脸红，终于脱口而出那句话：“你已经不是我丈夫了。”

　　“要不要现在打电话给律师问一下，我到底还是不是？”

　　她心里一点底气都没有。
translate it into English

Garrett suddenly pressed his hand against the wall and lowered himself in front of her, their breaths quickly entangled in an ambiguous manner. His deep voice finally rang out, "Are you angry?"

She turned her face away, too infuriated to provoke him further.

Garrett's sharp gaze stared directly at her, and suddenly, he burst into laughter.

This made her even more flushed with anger, and finally, she blurted out, "You're not my husband anymore."

"Do you want to call the lawyer right now and ask if I still am?"

She had no confidence whatsoever in her heart.
他运筹帷幄，想要怎样的结果，好像只要一句话就可以，而她呢？translate it into English
He strategized and manipulated the situation, as if he could achieve any desired outcome with just a few words. And what about her?
Claire哪里知道他在看什么，而且他很快就转了身，那么漫不经心的，回到自己刚刚站的位置，背对着她，淡淡一句：“去忙你的吧。”translate it into English

Claire had no idea what he was looking at, and he quickly turned around, so nonchalantly, returning to his previous position with his back facing her, and uttered in a casual tone, "Go about your business."

Garrett被气笑，她倔的，真像是一只被惹急的小野猫。

　　他细长性感的手指又放开反动的文件，然后再度转身，朝着她走去。

　　Claire心里一紧，下一秒就打开门往外跑。
translate it into English

Garrett chuckled at her stubbornness; she truly resembled an agitated little wildcat.

He released the rebellious documents from his slender and seductive fingers and turned around once again, walking towards her.

Claire's heart tightened, and the next second, she opened the door and ran out.

他对那个女人是不一样的，温柔又体贴。

　　也是，他们自小一起长大，又怎么是她一个突然冒出来的累赘能比的呢？

　　Claire往前走去，突然身后的门又开了，熟悉的女声响起：“Ms. Dale，麻烦帮我泡杯花茶进来哦，谢谢，对了，要孕妇能喝的哦。”
translate it into English

He was different with that woman, gentle and considerate.

Well, they had grown up together since childhood. How could she, a sudden burden, compare to that?

Claire continued walking forward, and suddenly the door behind her opened again. A familiar female voice spoke, "Ms. Dale, could you please make a cup of herbal tea for me? Thank you. Oh, and make sure it's safe for pregnant women to drink."
两个人很快赶到Harmony Regional Hospital，Edna还在输氧，Brenda看到他们俩的时候更是气的半死的模样，在走廊里就忍不住责问，“为什么要把那种东西留在家里？”translate it into English

The two of them quickly arrived at Harmony Regional Hospital, where Edna was still receiving oxygen. When Brenda saw them, she appeared furious, unable to contain her anger in the hallway. She couldn't help but question, "Why did you leave that thing at home?"

Brenda这才收敛了脾气，又扫了眼她儿子，声音却压低了很多：“进去后好好跟你们奶奶讲，她说什么你们都应着。”

　　Garrett没说话，Claire也觉得应该这样。
translate it into English

Brenda finally calmed down her temper and glanced at her son. Her voice lowered as she said, "When you go inside, talk to your grandmother properly. Whatever she says, just go along with it."

Garrett didn't say anything, and Claire felt that it was the right thing to do.

“你奶奶身体一向还不错，你是知道的，这次你们的事情给她打击很大，我想我们都不希望因为你们俩感情的问题失去奶奶，对不对？”

　　Brenda握住她的手，又继续讲。

　　Claire抬眼看她一眼，吓的半死。

　　失去奶奶？

　　他们俩的婚姻跟一条人命吗？
translate it into English

"Your grandmother has always been in good health, as you know. Your situation has greatly impacted her, and I believe none of us want to lose her because of your relationship issues, right?"

Brenda took hold of Claire's hand and continued speaking.

Claire looked up at her, frightened to death.

Lose Grandma?

Is their marriage worth a life?

她声音含糊，但是Claire还是缓缓地蹲在病床前，并且把自己的手送过去，与Edna的握着，她很小心，生怕把Edna弄疼了，轻声：“奶奶，我在。”

　　“受委屈了宝贝。”
translate it into English

Her voice was muffled, but Claire slowly squatted in front of the hospital bed and extended her hand, carefully holding Edna's hand. She was cautious, afraid of causing any pain to Edna. She spoke softly, "Grandma, I'm here."

"I'm sorry, my dear."

Edna稳定下来后，Brenda终于忍不住，用力拍着Garrett的肩膀责备道。

　　后来Garrett自己留在病房里，再出去的时候，只说了一声，“不离了。”

　　Claire听着他的声音朝他看去。

　　他那么失落的模样，她知道他肯定很不情愿，他一直想收回她是Mrs. Homan的身份。
translate it into English

After Edna stabilized, Brenda couldn't hold back any longer and forcefully tapped Garrett's shoulder, reproaching him.

Later, Garrett stayed behind in the hospital room. When he came out, he simply said, "I'm not leaving."

Claire listened to his voice and looked at him.

With his forlorn expression, she knew he was definitely unwilling. He had always wanted to reclaim her identity as Mrs. Homan.
两个人到楼梯间里，Garrett更是烦闷的叹了声，告诉她，“我暂时搬去跟你一起住。”translate it into English
The two of them entered the stairwell, and Garrett sighed in frustration. He told her, "I'm temporarily going to move in with you."
